name: Arbutin
description: Arbutin is a naturally occurring beta-D-glucopyranoside of hydroquinone that is extracted from the bearberry plant in the genus *Arctostaphylos*. As an inhibitor of tyrosinase activity in melanocytes, arbutin is used as a skin-lightening agent that prevents the melanin formation in various skin conditions involving cutaneous hyperpigmentation or hyperactive melanocyte function [A27248]. It has found to induce this effect *in vitro* at non-toxic concentrations.
